com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Class BaseSystemManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.BaseSystemManager

  • public class BaseSystemManager
extends java.lang.Object
    About the POS basic system API.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static BaseSystemManager getInstance(Context context)

      • ledControl

        public void ledControl(byte ledIndex,
                       BaseSystemManager.LedMode ledMode)
                throws BaseSystemException
        Control 4 LED lightson and off status reminder: E500 can only control bluelight
        Parameters:
        ledIndex - LED light index •BIT0 red light •BIT1 green light •BIT2 yellow light •BIT3 blue light •BIT4~BIT7 reserve
        ledMode - see BaseSystemManager.LedMode
        Throws:
        BaseSystemException

      • beep

        public void beep()
          throws BaseSystemException
        The buzzer immediately emits a beep for 100ms.
        Throws:
        BaseSystemException

      • beep

        public void beep(BaseSystemManager.EBeepMode mode,
                 int dlyTime)
          throws BaseSystemException
        Buzzer operation.
        Parameters:
        mode - BaseSystemManager.EBeepMode Sound frequency
        dlyTime - Lasting time of beep
        Throws:
        BaseSystemException

      • isOnBase

        public boolean isOnBase()
        Whether or not the base is in position.
        Returns:
        true:in position; false:not in position;
